improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion:
<meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try 3 free searches, then join from US$2/day.">
<meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Meet Gideon, Your AI Trade & Business Assistant">
<meta property="og:description" content="Claude-powered AI assistant for business owners, traders, and professionals. Instant answers, voice chat, unlimited workspace. Start with 3 free searches.">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:image" content="https://gdn.ai/og-image.jpg">
<meta property="og:url" content="https://gdn.ai">
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
<meta name="twitter:title" content="GDN AI – Meet Gideon, Your AI Trade & Business Assistant">
<meta name="twitter:description" content="Claude-powered AI for trade and business. Try 3 free searches, then unlock unlimited access from US$2/day.">
improvements.rationale: These tags improve search engine visibility with a keyword-rich meta description under 160 characters, while Open Graph and Twitter Card tags ensure professional, compelling previews when shared on social platforms. The copy highlights the free trial, Claude-powered technology, and low entry price to drive clicks and conversions without making unverified claims.

improvements.suggestion:
Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant

Meet Gideon — get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for your business decisions. Try three free searches today.
improvements.rationale: This headline immediately communicates what Gideon is (AI assistant for trade/business) and who it's for. The subheading highlights three key value props (instant answers, voice chat, professional support) while clearly stating the free trial offer to reduce friction and encourage first interaction.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches, you'll be invited to become a member. Membership starts at just US$2 per day, giving you unlimited access to Gideon's voice chat, your personal workspace, and professional trade and business support. Choose annual billing to save 30 percent.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the key conversion moment—when free trials end. It reassures visitors there's no surprise, transparently explains pricing, and reinforces value props (voice chat, workspace, support) while highlighting the annual savings incentive. Reduces friction and builds trust at the paywall decision point.
